name: antenna-prop
description: openEMS electromagnetic FDTD solver for the browser (WASM + WebGPU)

scripts.test: npm run test:wasm && npm run test:api && npm run test:gpu && npm run test:examples
scripts.test:examples: node examples/patch_antenna_test.mjs && node examples/msl_test.mjs && node examples/waveguide_test.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:browser && npm run test:browser:all && npm run test:app
